name: Okta Identity Engine
description: Advanced identity management using Okta Identity Engine APIs for user lifecycle, group management, MFA enforcement, and audit logging

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: List all users in the Okta organization with optional filtering, searching, and pagination

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Find users matching firstName, lastName, or email

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression for a subset of user properties (e.g. status eq "ACTIVE")

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search expression for most user properties

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 200)

actions.name: Get User
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific user by user ID, login, or email

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID, login, or email address

actions.name: Disable User
actions.description: Deactivate a user account, preventing login and access

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID of the user to deactivate

actions.name: Enable User
actions.description: Reactivate a previously deactivated user account

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID of the user to reactivate

parameters.name: sendEmail
parameters.description: Send activation email to the user

actions.name: Suspend User
actions.description: Suspend a user account, temporarily preventing login

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID of the user to suspend

actions.name: Unsuspend User
actions.description: Unsuspend a previously suspended user account

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID of the user to unsuspend

actions.name: Reset Password
actions.description: Generate a one-time token to reset the user's password

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID of the user to reset password for

parameters.name: sendEmail
parameters.description: Send password reset email to the user

actions.name: Clear User Sessions
actions.description: Remove all active sessions for a user, forcing re-authentication

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to clear sessions for

actions.name: List Groups
actions.description: List all groups in the Okta organization

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query matching group name

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression for group properties

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Group
actions.description: Retrieve details of a specific group

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Group ID to retrieve

actions.name: List Group Members
actions.description: List all members of a specific group

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Group ID to list members for

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Add User to Group
actions.description: Add a user to a group

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Group ID to add user to

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to add to the group

actions.name: Remove User from Group
actions.description: Remove a user from a group

parameters.name: groupId
parameters.description: Group ID to remove user from

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to remove from the group

actions.name: List User MFA Factors
actions.description: List all MFA factors enrolled for a user

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User ID to list factors for

actions.name: Get System Log Events
actions.description: Retrieve audit log events from the Okta system log

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Start date for log retrieval (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: End date for log retrieval (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression for log events

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for log events

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return
